subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the Beauty of the All-Glorious! Our hope is that Shahroud may be transformed into Baharoud, and that land be perfumed with the fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبان جمال ابهی ما را امید چنانست که شاهرود بهارود گردد و آن کشور بنفحات
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
